name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — atomic per-WP implementation via worktree → Red-Green-Blue cycle → commit → push. v0.1 stops at branch pushed to remote; v0.2 adds CI poll + direct merge to dev (no PR); v0.3 adds Sulis SDK deploy + health-check + smoke-test + mark done. Each WP is an atomic operation in the full lifecycle. Self-heals in-scope failures via OODA + Five Whys per executor-loop-standard.md; escalates out-of-scope failures via structured BLOCKER records. Follows git-workflow-standard.md (direct merge to dev, no PR ceremony). Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.
